integrationPoints.rationale: Bring shared PhaseState utilities (loadPhaseState, suggestNextAction, formatHumanSummary) into the server runtime.
Augment in-memory progress snapshots with workflow metadata per session.
Ensure snapshot builder can retrieve memoized workflow context for SSE and polling APIs.
Prime workflow context when a new execution session starts.
Guarantee workflow context is available when pausing sessions for HITL gates.
Preserve workflow context when resuming sessions so progress snapshots remain enriched.

notes: No code changes yet — discovery only.
Confirmed no Python or forbidden frameworks introduced.

existing.name: src/state/phaseState.ts
existing.reason: Source of PhaseState utilities that will be consumed in runtime.

risks.name: Circular dependency
risks.mitigation: Import utilities only (no runtime side-effects) and keep server.ts as consumer.

risks.name: Disk read overhead
risks.mitigation: Memoize workflow context per session to avoid repeated filesystem access.
